metadata.description: P4 — the prompty / prompter / pioneer / puppeteer meta-prompting framework; ships the Roboto four-lens reasoning instance as an installable plugin.

plugins.name: roboto
plugins.description: Roboto / "The Intelligence" — the four-lens reasoning instance of the P4 framework: identity, rubric, vlds, templates, bias-patterns, isomorphic-operations, and sjc-indexer skills plus a roboto subagent.
